Economist Jeremy Siegel finds Bitcoin a bigger threat than BRICS reserve currency. Trump showcased support for BTC at $100K. Siegel questions Trump's stance on BRICS nations wanting new reserve currency. BRICS comprises 9 countries. Siegel is a WisdomTree economist and Wharton School professor. Siegel sees BTC as a potential global currency.
news.summary: President-elect Donald Trump issued a warning to BRICS countries regarding a potential reserve currency, as economist Jeremy Siegel emphasized that Bitcoin poses a greater threat to replacing the dollar as a global reserve than any initiatives from BRICS nations. The BRICS organization consists of nine countries: Brazil, Russia, India, China, South Africa, Iran, Egypt, Ethiopia, and the United Arab Emirates. Siegel, a seasoned economist at WisdomTree and professor emeritus of finance at the Wharton School, University of Pennsylvania, highlighted the discrepancy in Trump's stance on tariffs against BRICS nations seeking a new reserve currency, juxtaposed with his endorsement of Bitcoin's value surpassing $100,000, linking it to his pro-cryptocurrency perspective. Siegel noted the potential for Bitcoin to function as an alternative global currency akin to the aspirations of the BRICS nations.

news.headline: China stocks surge as Asian markets rise on Beijing’s new stimulus plan.
Brazilian footballer Oscar dos Santos Emboaba Junior reflects on his eight years with Shanghai Port in the Chinese Super League.
news.summary: In Beijing on December 10, 2024, Brazilian soccer player Oscar dos Santos Emboaba Junior, also known as Oscar, is in a decision-making phase regarding his future in China after spending close to eight years there. He is currently part of the Chinese Super League (CSL) club Shanghai Port, and his contract with the team is approaching its end.

news.headline: Kenyan growth forecast reduced by World Bank due to floods, protests.
Crypto trader Ali Martinez plans to buy more Dogecoin between $0.40-$0.30, targets $3 with potential for $18. #bullish
news.summary: Renowned cryptocurrency trader and analyst Ali Martinez remained unfazed by Dogecoin's recent price drop and expressed his intention to capitalize on the dip by purchasing more of the popular meme coin. Martinez, recognized for his adeptness at identifying chart patterns and predicting the movements of major cryptocurrencies, emphasized that the current descent in DOGE's value occurred early in its bullish cycle. Grateful for the opportunity presented by the decline, Martinez disclosed his plan to acquire additional DOGE tokens within the $0.40-$0.30 range. He maintained a positive outlook on DOGE's potential, reiterating his price targets of $3 and possibly even $18 if market conditions permit such a surge. Emphasizing the advantageous timing of the dip, Martinez underscored his bullish stance on Dogecoin's future trajectory.

news.headline: Russia considers creating Bitcoin reserve amid sanctions, with Bitcoin near $100,000. Tkachev proposes idea to Finance Minister. Cryptocurrencies seen as vital for international trade due to limited access to traditional payment systems.
news.summary: Amid escalating tensions with Western financial systems, Russia is contemplating the creation of a strategic Bitcoin reserve as a response to President-elect Donald Trump's pro-cryptocurrency stance. State Duma deputy Anton Tkachev recently suggested to Russian Finance Minister Anton Siluanov the idea of establishing a Bitcoin reserve. This proposal comes at a time when Bitcoin is nearing the $100,000 mark, indicating a significant rise in global cryptocurrency usage. Tkachev emphasized the importance of cryptocurrencies, noting their value as a means of international trade for nations facing restrictions on traditional payment systems due to sanctions. This initiative mirrors Trump's plan to set up a national Bitcoin reserve.

news.headline: Datadog prices $870M in Convertible Senior Notes for 2029, private placement.
news.summary: Datadog, a leading monitoring and security platform for cloud applications, disclosed on Dec. 9, 2024, the pricing of $870 million in 0% Convertible Senior Notes due 2029. The notes were part of a private placement arranged by the company. Datadog, Inc., listed on Nasdaq as DDOG, is involved in providing services related to cloud technology.

Global Air Compressor Rental Market expected to reach USD 8,221.1 Million by 2033 at 6.8% CAGR. Key factors include cost efficiency, flexibility, technological advancements, and growing demand in various industries. Major acquisitions by Sunbelt Rentals and Atlas Copco Rental highlighted. Regional scope includes North America, Europe, Asia Pacific, Middle East & Africa, and South & Central America.
news.summary: The Air Compressor Rental Market is experiencing significant growth, with a current value of around USD 4,547.7 Million in 2024 and an expected increase to USD 8,221.1 Million by 2033 at a CAGR of 6.8%. This growth is attributed to factors such as cost efficiency, flexibility, and scalability offered by rental options, as well as the growing demand from industries like construction, manufacturing, oil & gas, mining, and power generation. Technological advancements in compressor technology and adherence to environmental regulations are also driving market expansion. Companies like Sunbelt Rentals and Atlas Copco Rental have made strategic acquisitions and introduced innovative solutions to enhance their market presence and offerings. The report covers market insights, growth factors, recent trends, and forecasts for the air compressor rental market globally, with a regional scope encompassing North America, Europe, Asia Pacific, Middle East & Africa, and South & Central America.

Santhera's AGAMREE (Vamorolone) approved by NICE for Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy treatment. Positive recommendation.
news.summary: Santhera has recently received a favorable recommendation from NICE for their drug AGAMREE® (Vamorolone) in the treatment of Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy. This recommendation signifies a significant step forward in the approval process for the drug, which has shown promise in clinical trials. Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy affects approximately 1 in every 3,500 to 5,000 male births, making it a rare and serious genetic disorder. The positive recommendation from NICE highlights the potential impact AGAMREE® could have in improving the lives of those affected by this debilitating condition.

news.headline: Vivoryon Therapeutics N.V. announces Q3 2024 results and updates on Varoglutamstat for kidney disease.
news.summary: In their latest report, Vivoryon Therapeutics N.V. disclosed their Q3 2024 results, showcasing notable advancements in Varoglutamstat for the treatment of kidney disease. The company revealed key highlights indicating significant progress in their research and development efforts. This update signifies a crucial step forward in their pursuit of innovative therapies.

news.headline: Royal Vopak completes EUR 300 million share buyback program, repurchasing 7,924,438 shares at average price of EUR 37.86 each.
news.summary: Royal Vopak, based in Rotterdam, the Netherlands, has successfully completed its share buyback program, returning EUR 300 million to shareholders. The company repurchased 7,924,438 ordinary shares, equal to 6.30% of its outstanding shares, at an average price of EUR 37.86 per share between February 14, 2024, and December 9, 2024. Post-cancellation, total issued outstanding shares will be 117,816,148. Vopak, operational for over 400 years, offers storage and infrastructure solutions globally for vital products like energy sources, chemicals, and edible oils. They are now prioritizing safety, reliability, and efficiency, aiming to support the energy transition by developing infrastructure solutions for hydrogen, ammonia, CO₂, long-duration energy storage, and low-carbon fuels & feedstocks. For additional details on the buyback program, visit vopak.com/investors/share-buyback-program-2024. For more information, Vopak can be reached at global.communication@vopak.com for press inquiries and investor.relations@vopak.com for analysts and investors.

news.headline: Kitron is focused on driving growth and profits in 2025 and beyond, updating investors on financial and commercial targets in a Capital Markets Presentation today.

news.headline: Melexis initiates buy-back program.

Roche's Columvi and Lunsumio data at ASH 2024 show potential to improve lymphoma outcomes, with 20+ abstracts presented. Chief Medical Officer highlights lasting remissions for people with advanced lymphoma. #Roche #lymphoma #ASH2024
news.summary: Roche announced new data from its CD20xCD3 T-cell-engaging bispecific antibody programme at the 66th ASH Annual Meeting, showcasing benefits of fixed-duration Columvi® and Lunsumio® across various lymphomas. More than 20 bispecific antibody abstracts were presented, highlighting lasting remissions in patients with advanced lymphoma. Roche aims to innovate treatment standards at earlier disease stages, offering innovative therapeutic options. Levi Garraway, Roche’s CMO, emphasized the potential of Columvi and Lunsumio in transforming treatment for B-cell malignancies.

Dassault Systèmes partners with UniLaSalle to launch 3DEXPERIENCE Edu Center of Excellence, making UniLaSalle the 25th member.
news.summary: VELIZY-VILLACOUBLAY, France & BEAUVAIS, France--Dassault Systèmes and UniLaSalle, a French engineering university specializing in life, digital, energy, and veterinary sciences, have revealed that UniLaSalle is now the 25th member of the global 3DEXPERIENCE Edu Center of Excellence program. This initiative, in partnership with Dassault Systèmes, aims to offer experiential learning using the 3DEXPERIENCE platform to drive the digital evolution of industries worldwide.

Cheung believes that investors should consider purchasing during these dips, indicating a favorable market trend.
